## beehiiv auth oauth login

Sign in with a custom Beehiiv OAuth app

### Synopsis

Authorize beehiiv-cli via the OAuth 2.0 authorization-code flow with PKCE
using a client ID from your own Beehiiv OAuth app.

For the default sign-in experience (no client ID required), use `beehiiv login`.

```
beehiiv auth oauth login [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv auth oauth login --client-id <id>
beehiiv auth oauth login --client-id <id> --scope all
beehiiv auth oauth login --client-id <id> --manual --no-browser
```

### Options

```
      --client-id string       Beehiiv OAuth client ID
      --client-secret string   Beehiiv OAuth client secret for confidential clients
  -h, --help                   help for login
      --manual                 Skip the local callback listener and paste the callback URL manually
      --no-browser             Print the authorization URL without opening a browser
      --redirect-uri string    Registered OAuth redirect URI (default "http://localhost:3008/callback")
      --scope stringArray      Requested OAuth scope; repeat or use 'all' (default [default])
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --api-key string          Override the Beehiiv API key
      --base-url string         Override the API base URL
      --compact                 Print compact JSON
      --config string           Override the settings file location
      --debug                   Print request URLs to stderr
      --output string           Choose the output format (json, table, raw)
      --publication-id string   Override the Beehiiv publication ID
      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit
      --raw                     Shorthand for --output raw
      --table                   Shorthand for --output table
      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
      --verbose                 Print request and response details to stderr
```
